## utm-dev ios screenshot

Capture a screenshot from the booted simulator

```
utm-dev ios screenshot [output-file] [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --clean-status   Set clean status bar (9:41, full battery) for App Store screenshots
  -h, --help           help for screenshot
```
